title: Agent-Driven Docker Executor (ADDE)
description: Go toolset + Python client for running agent-generated code in isolated Docker containers, with structured feedback for refiner agents.
highlights: Go CLI + Python client for isolated Docker execution with structured feedback
Image factory: prepare_build_context, build_image_from_context/path; list/prune/delete agent images
Security: network none by default, 512MB/0.5 CPU, code via put_archive (no shell); LangGraph-ready

title: K8s Quiz Game
description: An interactive quiz game to test and improve your Kubernetes knowledge. Built as a reusable React component package.
highlights: Interactive quiz game for Kubernetes knowledge testing
Reusable React component package published to npm
Multiple choice questions with instant feedback
